name: Tab bars | Apple Developer Documentation
snippet:
A tab bar lets people navigate among different sections of an app, like the Alarm, Stopwatch, and Timer tabs in the Clock app.
A tab bar floats above content at the bottom of the screen. Its items rest on a Liquid Glass background that allows content beneath to peek through. For tab ...

name: Toolbars | Apple Developer Documentation
snippet:
A toolbar consists of one or more sets of controls arranged horizontally along the top or bottom edge of the view, grouped into logical sections.
In contrast to a toolbar, a tab bar is specifically for navigating between areas of an app. Best practices. Choose items deliberately to avoid overcrowding.

name: Human Interface Guidelines | Apple Developer Documentation
snippet: The HIG contains guidance and best practices that can help you design a great experience for any Apple platform.

name: Navigation and search | Apple Developer Documentation
snippet: To navigate the symbols, press Up Arrow, Down Arrow, Left Arrow or Right Arrow. An icon of a grid comprised of four squares.

name: Explore navigation design for iOS - WWDC22 - Videos
snippet: Learn best practices and common pitfalls when working with tab bars, modality, and more. Resources. Explore the Human Interface Guidelines · HD Video · SD Video.

name: Buttons | Apple Developer Documentation
snippet: Versatile and highly customizable, buttons give people simple, familiar ways to do tasks in your app. In general, a button combines three attributes to clearly ...

name: Lists and tables | Apple Developer Documentation
snippet: A table or list can represent data that's organized in groups or hierarchies, and it can support user interactions like selecting, adding, deleting, and ...

name: Get to know the new design system - WWDC25 - Apple Developer
snippet: Dive deeper into the new design system to explore key changes to visual design, information architecture, and core system components.

name: What's new - Design - Apple Developer
snippet: Explore the new navigation system in iPadOS 18, which gives people the flexibility to choose between using a tab bar or sidebar. Design great visionOS apps.

name: Sheets | Apple Developer Documentation
snippet: A sheet is useful for requesting specific information from people or presenting a simple task that they can complete before returning to the parent view.
